title: Shake to undo
design_brief: Shake device to undo last action. Reference: iOS notes.

title: Sheet that supports landscape orientation
design_brief: Sheet that adapts on landscape (max-width or popover style).

title: FlashList with multi-column dynamic columns
design_brief: Column count adapts to screen width.

title: Address form auto-fill from credit card scan
design_brief: Scan credit card → auto-fill billing fields.

title: Tab bar with active label
design_brief: Active tab shows label; inactive tabs icon only. Reference: Threads.

title: Loading bar that mimics progress
design_brief: Top progress bar like YouTube/iOS Safari indicating page load.
mobile_reasoning: Width interpolation; spring to 100% on complete.

title: Animated card flip (3D)
design_brief: Card flips 180° to reveal back. Reference: card games.
mobile_reasoning: 3D rotation via transform perspective; back/front swap at 90°.

title: Audio file picker
design_brief: Pick audio file from device storage.

title: Map with route waypoints (drag to reorder)
design_brief: Trip planner: drag-reorder waypoints on map.
mobile_reasoning: List + map combined; reorder updates polyline.

title: Step counter ring with goal
design_brief: Apple Watch-style step ring with goal.

title: Modernist swiss design: rigid grid, sans-serif, red accent
design_brief: Swiss modernist UI: strict 12-column grid, Helvetica, single red accent.

title: App version display with hidden tap-to-show
design_brief: Settings shows app version; long-press shows build details.

title: Cognitive accessibility: simple-language toggle
design_brief: Toggle that swaps complex text for simpler version.

title: Native module bridging cost
design_brief: Understand cost of native module calls; batch when possible.
mobile_reasoning: JSI-based native modules avoid bridge entirely.

title: Audio note transcription preview
design_brief: Voice memo shows live transcription as user speaks.

title: Map with route alternatives (3 options)
design_brief: Routing UI shows 3 alternative routes with selection.

title: Pyramid chart for age demographics
design_brief: Demographic pyramid (left/right bars).
mobile_reasoning: Skia rects extending left/right from center.

title: Toast that swaps in for previous
design_brief: New toast replaces previous mid-display (e.g., rapid notifications).
mobile_reasoning: Replace top toast on new fire.

title: Animated text reveal (mask)
design_brief: Text revealed character by character via mask.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Group with clip width animating.

title: Video trim handles
design_brief: Video clip with drag handles to trim start/end.
mobile_reasoning: Two drag handles on timeline + preview update.

title: Persistent search bar across tabs
design_brief: Search bar at top of every tab that maintains query across navigation.

title: OTP biometric auto-confirm
design_brief: OTP entered → Face ID confirms.

title: Drag-to-reorder ghost preview
design_brief: While dragging, original row becomes ghost (low opacity).

title: Y2K aqua gel buttons
design_brief: Mac OS X 10.0 aqua-style glossy buttons.

title: Animated star rating fill
design_brief: Stars fill as rating set (Skia for smooth partial fill).
mobile_reasoning: Skia star path with clip rectangle.

title: Reanimated worklet scope cleanup
design_brief: Cancel animations on unmount to prevent leaks.

title: Multi-camera switching with lens-stack
design_brief: Switch between ultra-wide / wide / tele lenses (rn-011 extension).

title: Map with stops list synchronized to scroll
design_brief: Scroll list of stops → map pans to corresponding pin.
mobile_reasoning: List onViewableItemsChanged → animate map to top item.

title: Network graph (nodes + edges)
design_brief: Simple force-directed graph of connected nodes.
mobile_reasoning: Skia circles + lines; basic force simulation in worklet.

title: Vintage typewriter ribbon: black + red
design_brief: Typewriter aesthetic with red ribbon highlights.
